items.name: accordion-01
items.title: Basic

items.title: With icons
items.description: Leading icon beside each trigger label.

items.description: Grouped switch rows revealed inside each panel.

items.name: accordion-16
items.title: With subtitle

items.name: badge-12

items.name: badge-13

items.name: banner-03

items.name: banner-04

items.name: banner-06

items.name: banner-07

items.name: banner-09

items.name: banner-12

items.name: banner-14

items.title: Basic

items.name: breadcrumb-02

items.name: breadcrumb-03
items.title: Custom separator

items.name: breadcrumb-04

items.name: breadcrumb-05

items.description: Middle levels replaced by a static ellipsis icon, showing only the first and last crumbs.

items.name: breadcrumb-06

items.description: Ghost icon Button opens a menu of the hidden levels.

items.name: breadcrumb-07
items.title: Responsive collapse

items.name: breadcrumb-08
items.title: As link
items.description: Breadcrumb links that open in a new tab, with an external-link icon on the outbound crumb.

items.name: breadcrumb-09
items.title: Dropdown at end
items.description: Last crumb is a Button switcher for sibling pages.

items.name: button-01
items.title: Basic
items.description: Default button with text label.

items.name: button-02
items.title: Variants

items.name: button-03
items.title: Sizes

items.title: With leading icon
items.description: Button with an icon placed before the text label.

items.name: button-05

items.description: Button with an icon placed after the text label.

items.name: button-06
items.title: Icon only
items.description: Square icon-only buttons in every icon size.

items.name: button-07
items.title: Disabled
items.description: Button in the disabled state, visually dimmed and non-interactive.

items.title: Loading
items.description: Button with a spinning loader icon and label, indicating an in-progress async action.

items.name: button-09

items.description: Link-styled button that navigates to an external URL, rendered as an anchor with a trailing external-link icon.

items.name: button-10
items.title: With avatar
items.description: User picker style button with a small avatar image leading the text label.

items.name: button-11
items.title: Hover slide arrow
items.description: CTA arrow nudges right on hover.

items.name: button-12
items.title: With badge
items.description: Notification count badge overlapping an icon button.

items.name: button-13
items.title: Copy to clipboard
items.description: Icon and label swap to a check on copy.

items.name: button-14
items.title: Hover rotate refresh
items.description: Refresh button whose icon rotates a full 360° on each click.

items.name: button-15
items.title: Hamburger toggle
items.description: Three bars morph into an X on press.

items.name: button-16
items.title: Basic group
items.description: Horizontal row of buttons with merged borders, used for segmented controls like date range pickers.

items.name: button-17
items.title: Vertical group
items.description: Stacked column of buttons with merged borders, used for vertical navigation menus.

items.name: button-18
items.title: Icon toolbar
items.description: Compact toolbar of icon-only buttons with merged borders, used for text formatting actions.

items.name: button-20
items.title: With label prefix
items.description: Static text label leading a group of action buttons, useful for labelled sort or filter controls.

items.name: button-21
items.title: Split button
items.description: Primary action button paired with a chevron that opens a dropdown of secondary actions.

items.name: button-22
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Prev arrow, numbered page buttons, and Next arrow in a merged-border row.

items.name: button-23
items.title: Copy field
items.description: Read-only text value paired with a trailing icon button that copies it to the clipboard, with an animated check on success.

items.name: button-24
items.title: Group with disabled
items.description: Merged-border button row where one step is visually disabled and non-interactive.

items.name: button-25
items.title: Destructive pair
items.description: Cancel + Delete spaced action pair.

items.name: button-26
items.title: With select
items.description: Sort dropdown paired with a direction-toggle icon button in a merged-border row.

items.name: button-27
items.title: With popover swatch
items.description: Color swatch button that opens a grid of color swatches, paired with a hex value label in a merged-border row.

items.name: card-01

items.name: card-07

items.name: card-14

items.name: collapsible-01

items.title: FAQ list

items.name: collapsible-04
items.title: Read more

items.name: collapsible-06

items.name: command-01
items.title: Basic
items.description: Canonical command menu with grouped items, icons, and shortcuts.

items.name: command-02

items.name: command-04

items.name: command-08

items.name: command-09

items.name: command-10

items.name: command-11

items.description: Combobox composed with an accessible field Label.

items.name: command-12
items.title: React Hook Form + Zod
items.description: Controller binds the combobox to RHF; Zod resolver drives FieldError on submit.

items.name: command-13
items.title: TanStack Form + Zod
items.description: form.Field wires the combobox; Zod onSubmit validator surfaces FieldError when touched.
